summary: Iteration 5 regression testing after auth-tokenâ†’sessionStorage migration + useCallback refactor + stable row keys. All 17 backend pytest tests pass. Full frontend regression passed: sessionStorage.auth_token holds JWT (no localStorage.token); F5 reload preserves session via cookie; logout clears token and redirects to /login; all 12 protected routes render without React errors; Dashboard fetches /reports/dashboard and /reports/program-consumption exactly 2 times per mount (React.StrictMode intentional double-invoke in dev â€” NOT an infinite loop, count stays stable after further waits); Current Stock fb-search triggers /api/reports/current-stock?search=<term> correctly for 3 terms; Stock Entry se-prog-filter now fires /stock?department=MDS&search=&program=MR (iter-4 bug is fixed).
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard shows 2 fetches per mount in dev because index.js uses React.StrictMode (intentional double-invoke of effects). Prod build will fetch once. Not a bug.
Auth bootstrap correctly ignores 401 (expected cold-start) and logs only non-401 errors. Good separation.
sessionStorage-based token is now Bearer-attached in api.js interceptor as a fallback for third-party-cookie-blocked browsers; primary auth remains the httpOnly cookie â€” good defense-in-depth.
seed_data_creation: Test items/stock/issues created with TEST_<uuid> prefix and cleaned up by test_zzz_cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-5 review-request fixes verified. Auth token now lives in sessionStorage under key 'auth_token'; do NOT look for localStorage.token. Routes are at /current-stock, /monthly-utilisation, /indent-next-year, /supply-order, /short-expiry, /low-stock, /nil-stock (NO /reports prefix in frontend paths â€” that prefix is only for /api/reports/* on backend). Dashboard 2Ă— fetch in dev is StrictMode, not a bug.
rca of the issue: N/A â€” no bugs found this iteration.
